allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { "node: $\(node -v\)" } else { "node: NOT FOUND" }; $npm = \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($npm\) { "npm: $\(npm -v\)" } else { "npm: NOT FOUND" }; $corepack = \(Get-Command corepack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($corepack\) { "corepack: $\(corepack -v\)" } else { "corepack: NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location 'D:\\Personal\\COCOGLO\\invoice\\apps\\api'; $env:NODE_ENV='development'; node dist/server.js 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/v1/health' -TimeoutSec 5; "HEALTH: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { "HEALTH REQUEST FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "--- server output ---"; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)

PowerShell(pnpm install 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; "--- boot test ---"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location 'D:\\Personal\\COCOGLO\\invoice\\apps\\api'; $env:NODE_ENV='development'; node dist/server.js 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/v1/health' -TimeoutSec 5; "HEALTH: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { "HEALTH FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "--- server log ---"; Receive-Job $job | Select-Object -Last 6; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)

PowerShell(pnpm --filter @counter/api build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10; "--- boot test ---"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location 'D:\\Personal\\COCOGLO\\invoice\\apps\\api'; $env:NODE_ENV='development'; node dist/server.js 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/v1/health' -TimeoutSec 5; "HEALTH: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { "HEALTH FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "--- server log ---"; Receive-Job $job | Select-Object -Last 6; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
PowerShell(pushd apps\\api; pnpm seed:fresh 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^Query:' } | Select-Object -Last 12; popd)
PowerShell(pushd apps\\api; pnpm seed:fresh 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^Query:' } | Select-Object -Last 3; popd)
PowerShell(pushd apps\\api; pnpm seed:fresh 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^Query:' } | Select-Object -Last 4; popd)
